subject: feat(graph): add graph settings popover with data-driven node sizing and edge routing
body:
Two new user-facing graph visualization controls via a toolbar popover:

1. Size nodes by property: Dropdown populated from useGraphMetadata's new
   numericPropertyKeys field. GraphCanvas scans nodes for min/max of selected
   property and applies interpolated sizes. Analysis overlay takes precedence.

2. Edge routing: Toggle between bezier (curved, default) and taxi (right-angle).
   Taxi mode adds taxi-direction/taxi-turn for clean routing. Haystack rejected
   because it doesn't support edge arrows.

Implementation:
- GraphSettings type + DEFAULT_GRAPH_SETTINGS in types/index.ts
- GraphSettingsPopover component with ref callback positioning (React Compiler
  compliant), click-outside + Escape close, native select + radiogroup
- getCytoscapeStylesheet() now accepts edgeCurveStyle parameter
- useGraphMetadata extended with numericPropertyKeys (single-pass detection)
- App.tsx wires state, replaces inline nodeLabels memo with useGraphMetadata
- Gear icon trigger next to ViewSwitcher, visible in graph view only

All documentation updated: CLAUDE.md, HISTORY.md, USER_GUIDE.md,
TESTING_GUIDE.md, CODEBASE_DOCUMENTATION.md, SESSION_NOTES.md.

Tags: graph, settings, cytoscape, node-sizing, edge-routing, popover, ui
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
